headline: How Investors May Respond To American Express (AXP) NFL Alliance And Premium Engagement Push
summary: In recent weeks, American Express announced a multi-year global partnership to become the NFL’s Official Payments Partner from the 2026 season, rolled out its new Graphite Business Cash Unlimited Card with AI-enabled tools, and increased its quarterly dividend by 16%. Together with fresh lifestyle collaborations and experiential partnerships like the new Chef’s Table programming, these moves highlight American Express’s push to deepen engagement with premium consumers and businesses across...
